description: This endpoint allows you to create a new webhook for a given group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the group within the Fivetran system.

url.description: The endpoint URL where webhook events will be delivered.

events.description: List of event types that trigger the webhook.

active.description: Indicates if the webhook is enabled to send events immediately upon occurrence.

secret.description: A secret string used to sign webhook payloads for verification.
